ab: cel maki Sasi’ ka moṟow mu.

en: There are five people in our family.

ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: magaluw cu maki’ ci yaba’, yaya’, asuṟan malikuṟ lu asuṟan kanel mu.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: babawi’ ka yaba’ mu, kensacu ka hiya’.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: mahikang ka yaya’ mu, ising ka hiya’.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: maki’ moṟow ka yaba’ ga, makake’ min ci ke’ na itṟal.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the Atayal language with us at home.

ab: mahnguw min papasba’an ci ke’ ga, musa’ min alang.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: magaluw min kunṟak apatuṟ ci asuṟan mu.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: kisli’ mu caṟung ka utux moṟow mu.
en: I like our family very much.
